name: Alicha
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Meat with bone; beef, lamb
or goat, cut into 3 inch pieces
1 each Fresh hot green chili; sliced
recipeInstructions:
Alicha is a curry-like meal.
1. In a dry pan over medium heat, stir fry onions for 2 minutes.
2. Add the oil and stir fry for 1 minute longer.
3. Add the meat and brown it for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add all of the spices and seasonings at one time and stir well.
5. Add the water and bring to a boil.
6. Cover the pan and cook over moderate heat for about 45 minutes,
or until the meat is tender. If the curry dries out too quickly,
add another 1/2 cup of water.
7. At the end of the 45 minutes, there should be very little sauce.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
